name: Bhaderwah (Mini Kashmir)
description: Widely known as 'Mini Kashmir', this incredibly beautiful valley is nestled in the foothills of the Himalayas, offering lush pine forests, sparking streams, and rich culture.
history: Historically a principalities rules by local Rajas. Known as 'Nagar Bhaderwah', it is also deeply associated with ancient snake (Naga) worship.
famousFor: Pristine meadows, Padri Pass, Naga temples
bestTime: April to June, September to November
